name: get_elevation
description: Retrieve the elevation above sea level for one or more geographic coordinates. Also supports sampling elevation along a path between points, useful for terrain analysis and outdoor activity planning.

parameters.name: locations
parameters.description: One or more coordinates as 'lat,lng' pairs, pipe-separated. Use this for specific point elevations.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Two or more coordinates defining a path, pipe-separated. Used with 'samples' to get elevation along a route.

parameters.name: samples
parameters.description: Number of evenly-spaced sample points along the path. Required when using 'path'.
